info.title: Pctl Manager
info.author: Taylor
info.description: Parental controls without the phone app
info.details:
Configure the Switch daily play-time limit offline — no phone app, no Nintendo account, no internet. Talks to the system `pctl` service directly so the limit lives on the console.

Features:
- Set one daily limit for all days, or per-day limits (Sun–Sat).
- Remove the play-time limit entirely.
- Set / change the parental-controls PIN (via the system passcode applet).
- Delete all parental controls — your recovery when the PIN has been forgotten.
- Unlink the Nintendo Switch Parental Controls companion phone app.
- View status: PIN length, restrictions on/off, play-timer state.

When the play timer is currently active, writes first turn parental controls off temporarily (it reads the PIN automatically — no need to remember it) so writing the new limit doesn't destabilise Atmosphère; the new limit takes effect once parental controls re-engage.

Horizon-style graphical UI built on borealis.

Requires CFW (Atmosphère recommended). Tested on fw 22.1.0 / Atmosphère 1.11.1; other versions unverified.

changelog: v3.0.0\nUI rewrite onto borealis — Horizon-system-style graphical UI replaces the v2 text console. No functional changes — every action behaves the same.
